title: Extra Hearts
description: Extra Hearts is a vanilla datapack that increases the default number of player hearts in a stable and safe way, without using potion effects.
body:
❤️ Extra Hearts Datapack (Die once to activate the datapack.) 
📌 Overview
A vanilla-style datapack that permanently increases player health using the generic.max_health attribute. Stable, lag-free, and death-persistent.
✨ Key Features
✅ +10 Extra Hearts: Boosts all players to a total of 20 hearts.
✅ Permanent: Hearts stay with you even after death/respawn.
✅ Auto-Applied: Instantly buffs new players upon joining.
✅ Safe: No potion effects used; prevents crashes and conflicts.
⚙️ Technical Details
Version: Minecraft 1.20.1+
Compatibility: Works on Forge, Fabric, Paper, and Mohist.
Mechanism: Adjusts base health from 20 HP to 40 HP.
🔮 Roadmap
Custom commands for Admins to set heart counts.
World-specific and mode-specific health options.
